main_heading.title: Application Dates
main_heading.subtitle: Manage all submission windows, deadlines, and upcoming schedules

table_heading.title: Manage Application Dates
table_heading.subtitle: Use the table and filters below to view, edit, and manage start and end dates for student applications

student_heading.title: Available Application Dates for University Housing Enrollment
student_heading.subtitle: Choose from the available dates to submit your application according to the specified schedule.

add_period.title: Add New Date
add_period.description: Create a new application date for the admission period.

end_period.title: End Application Period
end_period.description: Close the application period and stop receiving new submissions.
end_period.opened_at: The application period was opened on {{date}} at {{time}}

start_period.title: Start Application Period
start_period.description: Open the application period so students can begin submitting their applications.
start_period.closed_at: The application period was closed on {{date}} at {{time}}

table.period_title: The application period is now open
table.period_details: The application period runs from {{start_date}} to {{end_date}}. This period is designated for {{student_type}} applicants. Eligible applicants include: {{who_can_apply}}. University: {{university}}. Please ensure that the application requirements match each applicant before applying, as submitting during an unsuitable period may result in rejection.

delete.title: Confirm Deletion
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this application period? This action cannot be undone

add.title: Add New Date
add.description: Create a new application date for the admission period.

view.title: View Period Details
view.description: Here you can view the details of the application period.

edit.title: Edit Application Period
edit.description: Edit the details of the application period.

start_period.title: Confirm Start Application Period
start_period.description: Are you sure you want to start the application period? Students will be able to begin submitting their applications.

end_period.title: Confirm End Application Period
end_period.description: Are you sure you want to end the application period? Students will no longer be able to submit applications.

truncate.title: Confirm Data Truncation
truncate.description: Are you sure you want to truncate all application periods? This action cannot be undone.

not_found.title: Application Window Not Yet Open
not_found.description: You will be notified via email as soon as the dates are announced.

important_notice.title: Important Notice
important_notice.description:
Please read carefully before proceeding:

1. Data registration for applying to university dormitories is only available during the designated time period.
2. The registration period is announced at the dormitory headquarters and on the university's official website.
3. After the deadline, registration will no longer be available in the system.

Make sure all information is complete and accurate before submitting.
